notes.proxy: ERC1967 UUPS proxy — this is the permanent address. Use this in all integrations.
notes.implementation: Current logic contract. Can be upgraded by owner (LUKSO Agent UP) without changing proxy address.
notes.upgrade: Call upgradeToAndCall(newImpl, data) on the proxy from the owner UP to upgrade.
notes.erc8004: ERC-8004 Identity Registry — LUKSO singleton. agentRegistry = eip155:42:0xe30B7514744D324e8bD93157E4c82230d6e6e8f3. LUKSO Agent = agentId 1.
